name: We are All Going to Die #3026

sheet.background_story:
Erdan grew up in a small troop of rangers but has always dreamed of traveling the world and seeing many of its wondrous sights.

He's often heard tales of The Wound and though he grasps the history of the place cannot fathom a crater as large as it's claimed to be, and so hopes to visit it himself one day.

Erdan Chernin ventured to The Southern Plains and discovered the teachings of Logun the Druid. Through awareness of The One, he shed his name and entered The Pyre.

description:
Erdan grew up in a small troop of rangers but has always dreamed of traveling the world and seeing many of its wondrous sights.

He's often heard tales of The Wound and though he grasps the history of the place cannot fathom a crater as large as it's claimed to be, and so hopes to visit it himself one day.

Erdan Chernin ventured to The Southern Plains and discovered the teachings of Logun the Druid. Through awareness of The One, he shed his name and entered The Pyre.
